title: tocoyena prostrata
intro: Tocoyena prostrata, also known as the red salamander tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tocoyena prostrata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Tocoyena prostrata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
